payload.answer: Ambiguity present: two different Sams (one associated with Goldman, one with Point72) and a separate memory that Sam likes Bill Evans. No resolution adopted yet; memory is stored in a way that preserves both contexts without merging.

entity_resolution.reason: Sam appears as multiple real-world persons linked to different employers; resolution requires disambiguation before merging into a single canonical entity.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman; Sam from Point72
Brain remembers Sam likes Bill Evans.

details: Stored two contextually distinct Sam entities and the associated relationships.
Preserved ambiguity to avoid false consolidation.
